visual-anti-patterns.notes: Purple-to-blue gradient background on landing and gallery pages; floating decorative orbs/circles on landing page; footer text and AI-panel timestamps appear below 16px

visual-child-friendly.notes: Emoji-based object picker, large tappable CTA buttons, playful language, suggestion chips reduce typing, low text density throughout

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent purple accent color, button style, and typography across all pages; toolbar is identical across builder views; landing page is slightly more decorative but cohesive

visual-accessibility.notes: All toolbar and object icons have clear text labels; dark-on-light contrast is generally strong; no focus rings visible in any screenshot; responsive behavior not demonstrated
